title: Vir Das Gets Therapy | #shorts
full_text: So, I am the world's leading almost therapist. I can solve whatever your problem is. Just tell me and let's go. >> My entire life is spent on animals and dogs. I'm spending all of my money on dogs. And I think we all know comedians don't have that much. >> How much money are you talking about? >> The dogs are in Mumbai. >> Mhm. >> Sleeping in luxury beds. >> Mhm. >> And I'm in a shitty hotel in New York. >> Help me understand why you can't just get rid of them. >> I'm their safe space. You >> who's the dogs? You're going to get older and what? The dogs are going to come and take care of you. >> Who takes care of you when you get older? Dogs don't make you pay for Stanford. All right. I'm just saying you keep putting this energy out into the world. Your son is going to marry a white girl. It's going to happen. >> Sir, let me just remind you that I'm the therapist here. I'm not the one. Do you see a problem in my life? No. We're going to do this revolutionary therapy that we've designed in this office. The cognitive behavioral therapy where you are going to tell a dog that this dog is shitty. The dogs don't even seem to like you. Now I'm offended. >> I brought this dog. I used this therapy because all you dog people need to break out of your bad habits. You need to say to her, I hate you. >> I hate [snorts] how cute you are. >> You're ruining my life. >> You are ruining my life. That would have been lonely without you anyway. My god. >> Stop it and say I'm sending you to the pound. Just slap her once. >> This lady costs more than you do. I'm not hitting a dog. Oh my god. I feel so good. I needed that today. Oh, >> I feel ready for the next 6 months now. >> Oh, great.
